signals.title: Scaling Trusted Access for Cyber with GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5-Cyber
signals.summary: OpenAI expands Trusted Access for Cyber with GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5-Cyber, helping verified defenders accelerate vulnerability research and protect critical infrastructure.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI发布GPT-5.5和网络安全专版，扩展可信网络安全访问计划，助力漏洞研究和基础设施保护

signals.title: Parloa builds service agents customers want to talk to
signals.summary: Parloa leverages OpenAI models to power scalable, voice-driven AI customer service agents, enabling enterprises to design, simulate, and deploy reliable, real-time interactions.
signals.aiSummary: Parloa基于OpenAI模型构建语音驱动的AI客服代理，为企业提供可扩展的实时交互服务解决方案

signals.title: Advancing voice intelligence with new models in the API
signals.summary: Explore new realtime voice models in the OpenAI API that can reason, translate, and transcribe speech, enabling more natural and intelligent voice experiences.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI推出实时语音模型API，支持推理、翻译、转录，将重塑AI语音交互入口体验

signals.title: Testing ads in ChatGPT
signals.summary: OpenAI begins testing ads in ChatGPT to support free access, with clear labeling, answer independence, strong privacy protections, and user control.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI开始在ChatGPT测试广告功能，支持免费访问，将影响AI入口商业化模式

signals.title: How frontier firms are pulling ahead
signals.summary: OpenAI’s B2B Signals research shows how frontier enterprises deepen AI adoption, scale Codex-powered agentic workflows, and build durable competitive advantage.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI研究显示前沿企业通过深化AI采用和扩展代理工作流构建持久竞争优势

signals.title: Unlocking large scale AI training networks with MRC (Multipath Reliable Connection)
signals.summary: OpenAI introduces MRC (Multipath Reliable Connection), a new supercomputer networking protocol released via OCP to improve resilience and performance in large-scale AI training clusters.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI发布MRC网络协议，提升大规模AI训练集群的resilience和性能

signals.title: GPT-5.5 Instant: smarter, clearer, and more personalized
signals.summary: GPT-5.5 Instant updates ChatGPT’s default model with smarter, more accurate answers, reduced hallucinations, and improved personalization controls.
signals.aiSummary: GPT-5.5 Instant升级ChatGPT默认模型，提供更智能准确的回答和个性化控制

signals.title: GPT-5.5 Instant System Card
signals.aiSummary: GPT-5.5即时系统发布，可能带来更快响应速度和更好用户体验，推动AI入口变革

signals.title: New ways to buy ChatGPT ads
signals.summary: OpenAI expands ChatGPT ads with a beta self-serve Ads Manager, CPC bidding, and enhanced measurement tools—built to protect privacy and keep conversations separate from ads.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI推出ChatGPT广告自助投放平台，支持CPC竞价和测量工具，标志着AI入口商业化重要进展

signals.title: OpenAI and PwC collaborate to reimagine the office of the CFO
signals.summary: OpenAI and PwC are partnering to help enterprises use AI agents to automate finance workflows, improve forecasting, strengthen controls, and modernize the CFO function.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI与普华永道合作，用AI代理自动化企业财务流程，重塑CFO职能

signals.title: How OpenAI delivers low-latency voice AI at scale
signals.summary: How OpenAI rebuilt its WebRTC stack to power real-time Voice AI with low latency, global scale, and seamless conversational turn-taking.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI重构WebRTC技术栈实现低延迟实时语音AI，推动语音交互成为新AI入口形态
